name: ref_mom_kinship_alias_no_proper_name
body: Mom called this evening — she wants to come visit next month.

name: ref_mom_alias_with_author_first_person
body: I talked to Mom today. She said the flight was fine.

name: ref_my_brother_alias_no_name
body: My brother finally got his driver's license today after three attempts.

name: ref_grandpa_alias_standalone
body: Grandpa is doing much better after the surgery last week.

name: ref_aunt_rosa_partial_alias
body: Aunt Rosa is flying in from Phoenix for the reunion.

name: ref_my_boss_role_alias
body: My boss pulled me aside today and said the project timeline is being pushed out.

name: ref_my_dentist_role_alias
body: My dentist wants me to come in every four months instead of six.

name: ref_the_landlord_role_alias
body: The landlord still hasn't fixed the leaky faucet in the bathroom.

name: ref_our_realtor_role_alias
body: Our realtor says the offer is strong but the sellers want two weeks to close.

name: ref_the_honda_object_alias
body: The Honda needs an oil change badly — it's been 7,000 miles.

name: ref_the_cabin_object_alias
body: Thinking about opening up the cabin this weekend if the weather holds.

name: ref_the_rat_animal_alias
body: The rat has been restless all night — probably needs more enrichment.

name: ref_summers_rat_possessive_animal_alias
body: Helped Summer clean out the cage for Summer's rat this afternoon.

name: ref_the_old_laptop_object_alias
body: Finally wiped the old laptop and listed it on Craigslist.

name: ref_author_first_person_doctor_visit
body: I saw the doctor this morning. She said everything looks normal.

name: ref_author_first_person_bp_measurement
body: My BP was high again — 148 over 92. Starting to worry.

name: ref_author_first_person_medication
body: I've been taking metformin for two weeks now and the side effects are mild.

name: ref_relayed_speech_mom_says_i
body: Mom told me: I take lisinopril every morning before breakfast.

name: ref_relayed_speech_mom_says_she_moving
body: Mom says she's moving to Florida next spring.

name: ref_relayed_speech_dana_texted_she_got_job
body: Dana texted that she got the job offer. So happy for her.

name: ref_relayed_speech_grandpa_quoted_i
body: Grandpa said on the phone: I haven't felt this good in years.

name: ref_relayed_speech_no_author_me
body: My brother texted: I'm staying an extra night in Seattle.

name: ref_mixed_author_and_named_third_party
body: I met with Priya Menon from legal this morning. My notes from the meeting are attached.

name: ref_mixed_author_role_alias_and_named_person
body: My boss approved the vacation request. Also ran into Kenji from the Chicago office.

name: ref_kinship_alias_with_proper_name_appositive
body: Aunt Rosa, who lives in Tucson, just retired from teaching.

name: ref_role_alias_my_therapist
body: My therapist suggested I try journaling before bed to manage the anxiety.

name: ref_object_alias_ownership_edge
body: I finally sold the Honda. Got $8,200 for it.

name: ref_kinship_grandma_possessive_note
body: Grandma's doctor said she needs to reduce sodium. I'm planning meals for her visit.
